loginPage.title: Login

viewerPage.title: Material Viewer

viewerPage.textViewPoint3: Use the completion action when you finish reading.

studentListPage.title: Exams
studentListPage.subtitle: Review assigned exams and start when you are ready.
studentListPage.onlyPublishedSubtitle: Only published exams can be started.

startPage.title: Start exam
startPage.subtitle: Loading exam summary...
startPage.cardSubtitleSummary: Check the key details before starting.
startPage.noticeText: No correct answers are shown before submission. Your answers will be saved locally in this UI-first mock flow during the taking task.
startPage.rulesSubtitle: Follow these rules during the exam.
startPage.rule1: Do not refresh or close the browser while taking the exam.
startPage.rule2: Submit before the timer reaches zero.
startPage.rule3: Correct answers are not visible until after submission and only if the review policy allows it.
startPage.rule4: Use the next task screen to answer questions; this screen only starts the exam.
startPage.notFoundDesc: The requested exam does not exist in mock data.
startPage.notFoundCopy: Return to the exam list and choose another exam.
startPage.readySubtitle: Ready to start when you are prepared.
startPage.toastUnavailableMessage: Only published exams can be started.
startPage.toastLoadErrorMessage: Could not load exam mock data.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.description: Use this page to detail your site's privacy policy.

errorPage.title: Error.
errorPage.subtitle: An error occurred while processing your request.
errorPage.devInfo1: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.
errorPage.devInfoWarning: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.
errorPage.devInfo2: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT variable to Development and restarting the app.
